title: T-055 — UI: TEC-070 D365 Sync Dashboard + TEC-071 Manual Sync Trigger
prompt: Build D365 sync dashboard (TEC-070) and manual sync trigger modal (TEC-071) per §13.8. Match `d365_status_screen` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:904-935 and `d365_item_sync_confirm_modal` design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:542-559. Uses T-028 + T-030 endpoints. RED tests/ui/tec-070-d365-dashboard.test.tsx. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-070-d365-dashboard.test.tsx`.

pipeline_inputs.description: D365 dashboard + manual sync trigger modal.
pipeline_inputs.details: Dashboard polls /api/technical/d365/health every 30s. Trigger modal asks for entity (items|bom|formula) + direction (pull|push). Shows last_sync_at + success-rate sparkline.
acceptance_criteria: Given the dashboard renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:904-935 and design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:542-559, then KPI cards, last-runs table, modal field set, and Cancel/Confirm button order match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
Given integration.d365.enabled=false, when on dashboard, then a banner shows 'Disabled' state.
Given user lacks technical.d365.sync.trigger, when on dashboard, then 'Sync now' button is hidden.
test_strategy: RED tests for parity + RBAC + flag-off banner.
risk_red_lines: Do not surface raw credentials in UI.
